mapper.select: /* jaram.common.mapper.CommonMapper.selectCommentList [댓글 목록 조회]*/ SELECT COMMENT_SEQ , EDT_SEQ , COMMENT_DEPTH , COMMENT_TEXT , COMMENT_PASSWORD , PARENT_COMMENT_SEQ , SECURE_YN , IMG_PATH , SUBSTRING(DATE_FORMAT(INPUT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i.%f'), 1, 20) AS INPUT_DT , INPUT_ID , INPUT_NAME FROM BOARD_COMMENT WHERE EDT_SEQ = #{EDT_SEQ} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY INPUT_DT DESC

/* jaram.common.mapper.CommonMapper.selectComment [댓글 조회]*/ SELECT COMMENT_SEQ , EDT_SEQ , COMMENT_DEPTH , COMMENT_TEXT , COMMENT_PASSWORD , PARENT_COMMENT_SEQ , SECURE_YN , IMG_PATH , DATE_FORMAT(INPUT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i.%f') AS INPUT_DT , INPUT_ID , INPUT_NAME FROM BOARD_COMMENT WHERE COMMENT_SEQ = #{COMMENT_SEQ} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY INPUT_DT DESC
